synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-20994 Important: Oracle Linux 10 ipa security update
description:
[4.12.2-24.0.1.1]
- Set IPAPLATFORM=rhel when build on Oracle Linux [Orabug: 29516674]
- Add bind to ipa-server-common Requires [Orabug: 36518596]

[4.12.2-24.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-118447 CVE-2025-7493 ipa: Privilege escalation from host to domain admin in FreeIPA
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-20994

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20994.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

[4.12.2-24.0.1.1]
